text:
The Federation of Ochima (, Ochima Renpō) is a country located below the Azian Continent on a yet unnamed continent and is one of the countries of the V6. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 33, Chapter 346 

Background

It was originally part of the V5 before the Kakin Empire joined them and they became the V6. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 33, Chapter 342 

In the past, the Federation of Ochima went to the Dark Continent southeast of Lake Mobius, looking for Nitro Rice. 99% fell prey to Hellbell before they even got to the swamps where the rice grows. Only eleven returned alive. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 33, Chapter 344
